intent_tree: {"处理一个MP3文件并确保声音清楚能听懂": {"选择最佳音质的MP3文件": {}, "增强音频清晰度": {"降噪处理": {}, "动态范围压缩": {}, "高通滤波": {}}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "列出指定目录中的所有MP3文件"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "交互式让用户选择目标MP3文件"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "预播放选定文件的前5秒以确认选择"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "读取选定的MP3文件为音频数据"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "将音频数据转换为numpy数组进行处理"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "使用noisereduce库对音频进行降噪处理"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "对降噪后的音频进行音量标准化"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "对音频应用动态范围压缩以提升语音清晰度"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "对音频应用高通滤波以去除低频噪音"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "将处理后的音频导出为新的MP3文件"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "fileSelection"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "confirmation"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "audioLoading"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "dataConversion"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "noiseReduction"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "normalization"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "dynamicRangeCompression"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "highPassFiltering"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "export"}]}
